module.name: protocol
module.purpose: Owns the shared session/task/execution protocol contracts exchanged over channels, plus the tool metadata contracts. session.rs defines the TaskId and ExeId identifiers and the top-level SessionEvent split between task and execution traffic; task.rs defines task signatures, task events (now including a Step(StepSignature, StepEvent) variant that splits a task into ordered steps), and task status; the step protocol now lives in the step child module (kind/signature/event/result/status/preview): StepKind with Model/Execution/User sub-kinds, StepSignature, the StepEvent stream, and the new StepResult, StepStatus, and StepPreview contracts; the execution protocol now lives in the execution child module (event/signature/status): the ExecutionEvent stream that carries ToolPreview values from the sibling tool module, the ExecutionUpdate content model, the ExecutionRequest whose lead field is an ExecutionSignature (task_id, exe_id, name) and whose tool_request carries a raw Option<String> tool input, the ExecutionSignature record, and the ExecutionStatus lifecycle enum; tool.rs now owns the ToolSchema input/output schema pair and the ToolPreview advertisement record (name, description, schema) that were relocated here from the removed common::tool module. message.rs defines SessionMessage, the between-session network envelope that wraps a SessionEvent together with a millisecond timestamp and the sending session's source_name; SessionMessage::new stamps the timestamp inline. mod.rs now also re-exports SessionMessage and the step protocol types (StepKind, ModelStepKind, ExecutionStepKind, UserStepKind, StepSignature, StepEvent, StepResult, StepStatus, StepPreview) and is otherwise namespace and re-export wiring only.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the step protocol: StepKind with Model(ModelStepKind)/Execution(ExecutionStepKind)/User(UserStepKind) sub-kinds (kind.rs), the StepSignature record carrying step_no/name/kind (signature.rs), the StepEvent stream enum whose Complete/Fail variants now carry a StepResult (event.rs), the StepResult content payload (result.rs), the StepStatus lifecycle enum Prepare/Process/Complete/Fail (status.rs), and the StepPreview signature+result record (preview.rs).

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns the execution protocol split into per-concern files: the ExecutionEvent stream enum with PreviewQuery/Preview/Evoke/Query/Cancel/Kill/Status/Update variants (carrying ToolPreview values, an ExecutionRequest, an ExecutionStatus, or an ExecutionUpdate), the ExecutionUpdate content payload, and the ExecutionRequest carrying an ExecutionSignature plus prompt, an optional raw tool_request string, and user_options (event.rs); the ExecutionSignature record of task_id/exe_id/name (signature.rs); and the ExecutionStatus lifecycle enum Started/Running/Canceled/Killed/Succeed/Failed (status.rs).
